g.text: C-004: Business requirements are out of scope
NFR-001: Explicit checks for core/basic, user needs, exceptions, auxiliary
NFR-002: Clarity, understandability, specificity, detail, refinement

DR-001..DR-005 stored in Markdown:
- review purpose & basis
- checklist items
- problem report
- scores (4x10 + total)
- reviewer & date
Persist checklist, scores, metadata, problem report
